def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved NVDA strategy combining momentum and mean reversion.
    
    Primary signal: Momentum-based entry when price above MA20, MACD positive, RSI 35-70
    Secondary signal: Mean reversion when RSI oversold and price near BB lower band
    Filter: Volume confirmation to reduce false signals
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "Volume", "BB_Pct"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Calculate volume moving average for confirmation
    volume_ma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    volume_filter = df["Volume"] > volume_ma * 0.8  # At least 80% of average volume
    
    # Primary momentum signal (from evo_g0_s0)
    momentum_signal = (
        (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) &
        (df["MACD_Hist"] > 0) &
        (df["RSI"] > 35) & 
        (df["RSI"] < 70) &
        volume_filter
    )
    
    # Secondary mean reversion signal
    # Buy when RSI oversold and price near lower Bollinger Band
    mean_reversion_signal = (
        (df["RSI"] < 30) &
        (df["BB_Pct"] < 0.15) &
        volume_filter
    )
    
    # Combine signals with slight preference for momentum
    signal = (momentum_signal | mean_reversion_signal).astype(int)
    
    # Additional filter: avoid entries right after strong moves (RSI > 75)
    # This reduces overbought entries
    overbought_filter = df["RSI"] <= 75
    signal = signal & overbought_filter
    
    return signal.astype(int)

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    NVDA trading strategy combining momentum and mean reversion.
    Long when: price above MA20 AND MACD histogram positive AND RSI not overbought
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist", "RSI"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Entry conditions:
    # 1. Price above 20-day MA (uptrend)
    # 2. MACD histogram positive (bullish momentum)
    # 3. RSI between 35-70 (not oversold, not overbought)
    condition1 = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    condition2 = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    condition3 = (df["RSI"] > 35) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    
    signal = (condition1 & condition2 & condition3).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    NVDA trading strategy based on MACD momentum and RSI confirmation.
    Goes long when MACD histogram turns positive and RSI is not overbought.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    if "MACD_Hist" not in df.columns or "RSI" not in df.columns:
        return signal
    
    # MACD histogram crosses above zero (bullish momentum)
    macd_cross = (df["MACD_Hist"] > 0) & (df["MACD_Hist"].shift(1) <= 0)
    
    # RSI is in reasonable range (not overbought, not too oversold)
    rsi_condition = (df["RSI"] > 35) & (df["RSI"] < 75)
    
    # Combine conditions: enter on MACD cross with RSI confirmation
    signal = (macd_cross & rsi_condition).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved NVDA strategy combining momentum, mean reversion, and volume confirmation.
    Requires: price above MA20, MACD positive, RSI confirmation, and volume surge.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "Volume"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Calculate volume ratio (current volume vs 20-day average)
    volume_ma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    volume_ratio = df["Volume"] / volume_ma
    
    # Condition 1: Price above 20-day MA (uptrend)
    condition1 = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    
    # Condition 2: MACD histogram positive (bullish momentum)
    condition2 = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    
    # Condition 3: MACD histogram growing (momentum acceleration)
    macd_growing = df["MACD_Hist"] > df["MACD_Hist"].shift(1)
    
    # Condition 4: RSI in sweet spot (not oversold, not overbought)
    condition4 = (df["RSI"] > 40) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    
    # Condition 5: Volume confirmation (volume surge indicates conviction)
    volume_surge = volume_ratio > 1.2
    
    # Condition 6: Additional filter - avoid when RSI is too extreme
    rsi_stable = df["RSI"] < 80
    
    # Combine all conditions
    signal = (condition1 & condition2 & macd_growing & condition4 & volume_surge & rsi_stable).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved NVDA strategy combining best entry from evo_g0_s0 with refined exit logic.
    Long when: price above MA20 AND MACD histogram positive AND RSI not overbought
    AND volume confirmation. Exit on RSI overbought or MACD histogram turns negative.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "Volume", "MA5"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Entry conditions from evo_g0_s0 (best performer):
    # 1. Price above 20-day MA (uptrend)
    # 2. MACD histogram positive (bullish momentum)
    # 3. RSI between 35-70 (not oversold, not overbought)
    condition1 = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    condition2 = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    condition3 = (df["RSI"] > 35) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    
    # Additional filter: volume confirmation (above MA of volume)
    # and price above shorter MA (MA5) for tighter entry
    volume_ma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    condition4 = df["Volume"] > volume_ma
    condition5 = df["Close"] > df["MA5"]
    
    # Entry signal: all conditions must be met
    entry_signal = condition1 & condition2 & condition3 & condition4 & condition5
    
    # Exit conditions (refined from evo_g0_s2):
    # Exit when MACD histogram turns negative (momentum reversal)
    # OR RSI becomes overbought (>75)
    macd_negative = df["MACD_Hist"] <= 0
    rsi_overbought = df["RSI"] > 75
    
    exit_signal = macd_negative | rsi_overbought
    
    # Build position signal: enter on entry_signal, stay in until exit_signal
    position = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    in_position = False
    
    for i in range(len(df)):
        if entry_signal.iloc[i] and not in_position:
            in_position = True
            position.iloc[i] = 1
        elif in_position and exit_signal.iloc[i]:
            in_position = False
            position.iloc[i] = 0
        elif in_position:
            position.iloc[i] = 1
    
    return position

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved NVDA strategy combining momentum and mean reversion with trend confirmation.
    Requires: price above MA20, MACD positive, RSI confirmation, and strong trend (ROC-based).
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "ROC", "Volume"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Trend confirmation: ROC > 0 indicates positive momentum
    trend_filter = df["ROC"] > 0
    
    # Entry conditions from best strategy (evo_g0_s0)
    condition1 = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    condition2 = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    condition3 = (df["RSI"] > 35) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    
    # Enhanced with MACD cross detection for better timing
    macd_cross = (df["MACD_Hist"] > 0) & (df["MACD_Hist"].shift(1) <= 0)
    
    # Volume confirmation: avoid low volume entries
    vol_ma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    volume_filter = df["Volume"] > vol_ma * 0.8
    
    # Combine: base conditions OR MACD cross, with trend and volume filters
    base_signal = (condition1 & condition2 & condition3) | macd_cross
    signal = (base_signal & trend_filter & volume_filter).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Hybrid NVDA strategy combining momentum and mean-reversion.
    - Momentum: Price above MA20 + MACD positive + RSI 35-70
    - Mean-reversion: RSI oversold + price near BB lower band
    - Filter: Volume confirmation to reduce false signals
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "BB_Pct", "Volume", "MA5"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Calculate volume SMA for confirmation
    volume_ma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    volume_filter = df["Volume"] > volume_ma * 0.8
    
    # Momentum entry: uptrend + bullish MACD + RSI not extreme
    momentum_cond1 = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    momentum_cond2 = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    momentum_cond3 = (df["RSI"] > 35) & (df["RSI"] < 70)
    momentum_signal = momentum_cond1 & momentum_cond2 & momentum_cond3
    
    # Mean-reversion entry: oversold RSI + price near lower BB
    mr_cond1 = df["RSI"] < 30
    mr_cond2 = df["BB_Pct"] < 0.15
    mr_cond3 = df["Close"] > df["MA5"]  # Slight upward bounce confirmation
    mean_reversion_signal = mr_cond1 & mr_cond2 & mr_cond3
    
    # Combine both signals with volume filter
    combined_signal = (momentum_signal | mean_reversion_signal) & volume_filter
    
    signal = combined_signal.astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved NVDA strategy combining momentum, mean reversion, and volatility filtering.
    Requires: price structure (MA), momentum (MACD), oscillator (RSI), and volatility (BB_Width).
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "BB_Width", "Volume"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Volatility filter: only trade when BB_Width is moderate (not too tight, not too wide)
    # This reduces false signals during low volatility and avoids high-noise periods
    bb_width_sma = df["BB_Width"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    bb_width_ratio = df["BB_Width"] / (bb_width_sma + 1e-8)
    volatility_filter = (bb_width_ratio > 0.7) & (bb_width_ratio < 1.5)
    
    # Trend filter: price above MA20 (uptrend bias)
    trend_filter = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    
    # Momentum condition 1: MACD histogram positive (from best strategy)
    macd_positive = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0
    
    # Momentum condition 2: MACD histogram crossover (from second strategy)
    macd_cross = (df["MACD_Hist"] > 0) & (df["MACD_Hist"].shift(1) <= 0)
    
    # RSI condition: balanced range avoiding extremes
    rsi_condition = (df["RSI"] > 40) & (df["RSI"] < 75)
    
    # Volume filter: above average volume for confirmation
    volume_sma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    volume_filter = df["Volume"] > volume_sma
    
    # Combined signal: 
    # - Trend must be up (MA20)
    # - Volatility must be moderate
    # - Either MACD positive with crossover OR MACD positive with good RSI
    # - RSI in reasonable range
    # - Volume confirmation
    signal = (
        trend_filter & 
        volatility_filter & 
        macd_positive & 
        rsi_condition & 
        volume_filter &
        (macd_cross | (df["RSI"] < 65))
    ).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved NVDA strategy combining best entry from evo_g0_s0 with 
    refined exit logic and volume confirmation filter.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MA50", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "Volume"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Strong entry conditions from evo_g0_s0 (best performer)
    condition1 = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]  # Price above MA20 (uptrend)
    condition2 = df["MACD_Hist"] > 0  # MACD histogram positive
    condition3 = (df["RSI"] > 35) & (df["RSI"] < 70)  # RSI in good range
    
    # Additional filter: Price above MA50 for stronger uptrend confirmation
    condition4 = df["Close"] > df["MA50"]
    
    # Volume confirmation: above average volume
    avg_volume = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    condition5 = df["Volume"] > avg_volume
    
    # Entry signal: combine all conditions for higher quality entries
    entry_signal = (condition1 & condition2 & condition3 & condition4 & condition5).astype(int)
    
    # Exit signal: when MACD histogram turns negative (from evo_g0_s2 concept)
    macd_negative = df["MACD_Hist"] <= 0
    
    # Exit also when RSI becomes overbought
    rsi_overbought = df["RSI"] > 75
    
    # Exit also when price falls below MA20
    price_below_ma20 = df["Close"] < df["MA20"]
    
    # Apply exit logic: if we're in a position and exit condition met, signal 0
    signal = entry_signal.copy()
    
    # For positions, apply exit conditions
    in_position = False
    for i in range(len(signal)):
        if signal.iloc[i] == 1:
            in_position = True
        elif in_position and (macd_negative.iloc[i] or rsi_overbought.iloc[i] or price_below_ma20.iloc[i]):
            signal.iloc[i] = 0
            in_position = False
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Improved NVDA strategy combining momentum, mean reversion, and volatility filters.
    - Primary: Momentum entry (MA20 + MACD) with RSI confirmation
    - Secondary: Mean reversion entry (oversold RSI + BB_Pct) for additional signals
    - Filter: Volume confirmation and trend validation
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MA50", "MACD_Hist", "RSI", "BB_Pct", "Volume"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Calculate volume moving average for confirmation
    vol_ma = df["Volume"].rolling(window=20).mean()
    volume_filter = df["Volume"] > vol_ma * 0.8  # Allow slightly below average volume
    
    # Trend filter: price above MA50 (stronger uptrend)
    trend_filter = df["Close"] > df["MA50"]
    
    # Momentum entry: Price above MA20 AND MACD positive AND RSI 40-70
    momentum_entry = (
        (df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) &
        (df["MACD_Hist"] > 0) &
        (df["RSI"] > 40) &
        (df["RSI"] < 70) &
        volume_filter
    )
    
    # Mean reversion entry: RSI oversold AND price near BB lower band
    # Only when in uptrend to avoid catching falling knives
    mean_reversion_entry = (
        (df["RSI"] < 30) &
        (df["BB_Pct"] < 0.15) &
        trend_filter &
        volume_filter
    )
    
    # Combine both entry signals
    signal = (momentum_entry | mean_reversion_entry).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    NVDA Trading Strategy: Long when price breaks above MA20 and MACD histogram is positive.
    Simple momentum-based approach with trend confirmation.
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check required columns
    required_cols = ["Close", "MA20", "MACD_Hist"]
    if not all(col in df.columns for col in required_cols):
        return signal
    
    # Generate signal: long when price above MA20 AND MACD histogram positive
    # This captures uptrend with momentum confirmation
    signal = ((df["Close"] > df["MA20"]) & (df["MACD_Hist"] > 0)).astype(int)
    
    return signal

def strategy(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.Series:
    """
    Args:
        df: DataFrame with columns: Open, High, Low, Close, Volume, MA5, MA10, MA20, MA50, EMA12, EMA26, MACD, MACD_Signal, MACD_Hist, RSI, Stoch_K, Stoch_D, ROC, BB_Pct, BB_Width...
    Returns:
        pd.Series of integers: 1 (long), 0 (flat)
    """
    signal = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    
    # Check for required columns
    if "Close" not in df.columns or "MA20" not in df.columns or "RSI" not in df.columns:
        return signal
    
    # Strategy: Long when price crosses above MA20 AND RSI is not overbought
    # This captures momentum moves while avoiding exhausted rallies
    price_above_ma = df["Close"] > df["MA20"]
    price_was_below_ma = df["Close"].shift(1) <= df["MA20"].shift(1)
    rsi_not_overbought = df["RSI"] < 70
    
    signal = ((price_above_ma & price_was_below_ma & rsi_not_overbought)).astype(int)
    
    return signal
